packageName: First Nations Governance Commons Public Demo
recommendedDecision: Use Pilot Control Tower as the default review front door, then follow the sequence through Organisation Onboarding, Private Pilot Readiness, Pilot Operations Control, Private Pilot Implementation, Private Pilot Launch Control, Private Pilot Closeout Decision, Private Pilot Authority Approval, and Activation Drill & Decision Record. Any real private pilot still needs a separate approved private environment, named operators, authority quorum, IDS/data governance review, privacy impact decision, role access register, participant notice/consent, private environment activation, signoff matrix, tabletop scenarios, evidence packet, activation decision record, first-72-hour monitoring, and closeout/archive trigger.

localDecidimStatus.githubCliAuth: hold: logged in as Shadow-3 without project scope
localDecidimStatus.node: hold: v24.14.0 detected; Decidim develop docs currently list Node 22.14.x for manual setup
localDecidimStatus.browserTestTooling: hold: Chromium/Playwright available through Codex tooling, not confirmed as project dependency
localDecidimStatus.decidimApp: blocked: no real Decidim app scaffold exists in this static package

safetyRules: Fake/sample data only in public demo and sandbox.
No real community records.
No member lists.
No cultural material.
No real voting or eligibility data.
Real pilot requires separate governance, data, privacy, cultural safety, and hosting approvals.
No youth records or guardian/school/program records.
No personal service cases or complaints.
No real provider contract or spend approval.
No real milestone payment release or procurement decision.
No real membership applications or Toastmasters member numbers.
No payment, address, phone, email, access-need, signature, official club record, private organisation contact, or real authority data in the public demo.
Toastmasters First Nations is a controlled sample only; real intake, meeting links, official paperwork, sponsorship/payment reconciliation, and charter acceptance stay outside the package.
No real private pilot records in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data sandbox.
Private pilot cannot start until privacy notice, consent, role access, data-transfer map, incident response, hosting, withdrawal/deletion, official handoff, and closeout are approved.
Organisation supporters cannot receive member data, access needs, payments, official acceptance records, or unrestricted admin access by default.
Pilot Operations Control is a public fake/sample template only. It must not be used as the private pilot system of record.

Real private pilot operations require a separate approved private environment with role access, incident response, official handoff, retention, deletion, and closeout evidence before any real records are collected.
No real meeting links, incident details, official Toastmasters forms, member numbers, payment records, access needs, or private participant states belong in public evidence.
Private Pilot Implementation is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real private pilot records.

Real intake requires a separate approved private environment with named operators, minimum fields, role access, privacy notice, consent and withdrawal, incident response, official handoff, retention, deletion, and closeout evidence.
Never store real member numbers, official applications, signatures, payment/card details, meeting links, access needs, incident details, or authority records in the public demo.
Private Pilot Launch Control is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real private pilot records.
Real controlled intake cannot open until v2.8 implementation and v2.9 launch gates are approved in a separate private environment.
No real launch meeting links, official Toastmasters records, access needs, incident details, payment details, member numbers, authority records, or private decision records belong in public evidence.

Private Pilot Closeout Decision is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real closeout records, evidence, incident details, access needs, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or authority records.

No repeat, scale, archive, handoff, or second controlled pilot should proceed until closeout checks, evidence classification, deletion/retention proof, access review, public summary redaction QA, and a decision record are complete.
Public learning from the pilot must be aggregate, redacted, and approved; never-public evidence remains only in the approved private environment.

Private Pilot Authority Approval is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, or private pilot evidence.

No real private pilot intake, private Decidim workspace, provider handoff, or second-pilot scale path should proceed until authority, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, privacy impact, role access, notice/consent, private environment activation, and scale criteria are approved.
Developer custody and repository maintainership do not equal First Nations community authority.

Activation Drill & Decision Record is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.

No real private pilot intake should proceed until activation drill, signoff matrix, tabletop scenarios, evidence packet, rehearsal tasks, first-72-hour monitoring checks, and recorded go/hold/no-go decision have passed.

Pilot Control Tower is a public fake/sample template only; it must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
No real private pilot decision should be made from any single page; use the Control Tower to review stage status, blockers, dependencies, evidence classes, owners, and decision route first.

assuranceRoom.safetyRule: No real community records, member data, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, or real decision outcomes are allowed in the public demo or fake-data sandbox.

seedStudio.safetyRule: No real community records, member lists, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, youth records, personal service cases, private contact records, or real decision outcomes are allowed.

buildPack.safetyRule: No real community records, member lists, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, youth records, personal service cases, private contact records, or real decision outcomes are allowed in the public demo or fake-data sandbox.

provider_cannot_explain_decidim_setup_hosting_admin_and_handover

provider_treats_static_mockup_as_decidim_sandbox

buildPartnerDesk.safetyRule: No real provider endorsements, real procurement decisions, community records, member lists, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, youth records, personal service cases, private contact records, or real decision outcomes are included.

noGoTriggers: provider_requests_real_community_data
provider_refuses_source_code_or_agpl_clarity
provider_substitutes_static_mockup_for_decidim

critical_acceptance_evidence_missing

buildDeliveryControl.safetyRule: No real provider contract, procurement decision, spend approval, community records, member lists, cultural material, eligibility data, voting data, youth records, personal service cases, private contact records, or real decision outcomes are included.

toastmastersSampleFacts.minimumOfficerSlate: President, one Vice President, and Secretary or Secretary/Treasurer held by three different people
toastmastersSampleFacts.officialMembershipBoundary: Official membership starts only after official Toastmasters paperwork, sponsorship/payment reconciliation, and charter acceptance.

noGoTriggers: public_demo_collects_real_member_or_contact_data
demo_first_or_supporter_contacts_counted_as_charter_members
official_toastmasters_paperwork_stored_in_public_package
payment_or_card_details_collected_in_public_demo
organisation_support_role_implies_authority_over_member_data
sample_initiative_treated_as_real_community_authority
organisationOnboarding.safetyRule: No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
organisationOnboarding.controlledSampleRule: This is not official Toastmasters membership, application, payment, meeting-link, or member-record infrastructure. It is a public fake/sample coordination test only.

noGoTriggers: public_demo_used_as_real_private_intake
real_private_field_appears_in_public_evidence
organisation_supporter_receives_member_data_access
official_toastmasters_paperwork_stored_in_governance_commons_public_package
privacy_notice_or_role_access_missing
incident_response_owner_missing
pilot_advances_without_go_no_go_meeting
privatePilotReadiness.safetyRule: Private pilot controls are public templates only. No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
privatePilotReadiness.controlledPilotRule: Private-pilot controls are templates only. Real records require a separate private environment, approved notices, role access, incident response, and closeout.

noGoTriggers: real_private_field_enters_public_demo_or_public_repository
official_toastmasters_record_stored_in_governance_commons_public_package
payment_or_sponsorship_detail_enters_governance_commons
access_need_visible_to_organisation_supporters_or_public_reviewers
withdrawal_or_correction_request_has_no_owner
incident_has_no_response_clock_or_closeout_evidence
public_wording_implies_chartered_club_or_official_membership_before_acceptance
pilot_continues_without_daily_authority_decision
privatePilotOps.safetyRule: Pilot operations controls are public templates only. No real membership, address, phone, email, access-need, official application, Toastmasters member-number, payment, signature, private organisation contact, meeting link, incident detail, or real authority data belongs in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
privatePilotOps.runDayRule: Operate only after v2.6 readiness approval and keep all real private records in a separate approved private environment with role access, incident response, official handoff, retention, deletion, and closeout evidence.

noGoTriggers: Real private data appears in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, public CSVs, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
Official Toastmasters applications, signatures, member numbers, payment/card details, or meeting links are stored in the public package.
The private environment has no named owner, MFA, backup/export, incident route, or deletion rule.
A participant cannot withdraw, ask what is stored, or request correction.
Access needs or incident details are copied into public evidence.
Supporters, mentors, demo-first attendees, or unsure contacts are counted as charter-ready founders without confirmation.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty

privatePilotImplementation.safetyRule: This public package is fake/sample only. Real First Nations Toastmasters pilot records require a separate approved private environment with named operators, privacy controls, official handoff boundaries, incident response, retention, deletion, and closeout evidence.
privatePilotImplementation.implementationRule: Do not open real intake until required implementation actions, required environment controls, never-public field rules, and access register are approved.

noGoTriggers: Any real private field, meeting link, official form, member number, payment detail, access need, incident detail, or authority record appears in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, public CSVs, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
Controlled intake opens before privacy notice, consent, withdrawal, access register, private environment smoke test, official handoff boundary, and go/no-go decision are approved.
Supporters, mentors, sponsors, demo-first attendees, or unsure contacts are counted as charter-ready founders without confirmation.
Public wording implies an official Toastmasters club, official membership, charter acceptance, or guaranteed pathway before the official process confirms it.
Incident, access support, withdrawal, deletion, or correction requests have no owner or response clock.
Weekly learning review or closeout decision is skipped, leaving no evidence for proceed, hold, or no-go.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty

privatePilotLaunch.safetyRule: This public v2.9 launch package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real private pilot records, meeting links, official Toastmasters records, access needs, incidents, payment details, member numbers, or authority records.
privatePilotLaunch.launchRule: Do not open controlled real intake until v2.8 implementation gates pass, v2.9 launch gates are approved, and the private environment is the only system of record.
privatePilotLaunch.nextDecision: Proceed, hold, or no-go after first 30 days based on gates, public evidence boundary, official handoff boundary, support, withdrawal, incident, deletion, retention, and learning evidence.

noGoTriggers: Pilot repeats, scales, or hands off without closeout decision evidence.
Private closeout evidence, incident details, access needs, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or authority records appear in the public package.
Records inventory, deletion proof, retention reason, access revocation, or withdrawal/correction resolution is missing.
Supporters, sponsors, or public reviewers receive member data, access needs, incidents, official records, or unrestricted private access.
A second pilot opens using old consent, old gates, or old public wording.
Community authority is implied by repository maintainers or developer custody instead of the approved authority pathway.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty

privatePilotCloseout.safetyRule: This public v3.0 closeout package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real closeout records, private pilot evidence, incident details, access needs, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or authority records.
privatePilotCloseout.closeoutRule: Do not repeat, scale, archive, or hand off the pilot until closeout checks, evidence ledger, deletion/retention proof, official boundary, and proceed/hold/no-go decision are recorded.

noGoTriggers: Real intake opens before authority and data governance approval are recorded.
Developer custody or repository maintainership is treated as community authority.
Private pilot records enter GitHub Pages, public CSVs, public screenshots, public repo issues, or the fake Decidim sandbox.
Official Toastmasters records, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter forms are stored in the public package.
Consent, withdrawal, correction, retention, deletion, or incident response is missing or untested.
A provider or public reviewer receives real participant data before contract, authority, and privacy approval.
Scale or second pilot proceeds without closeout, redaction QA, and authority record.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics
OAIC Guide to undertaking privacy impact assessments

privatePilotAuthority.safetyRule: This public v3.1 authority package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, or private pilot evidence.
privatePilotAuthority.approvalRule: Do not activate any real private pilot, private Decidim workspace, EOI intake, provider handoff, or second pilot until authority, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, privacy impact, role access, participant notice, private environment, and scale criteria are approved.

noGoTriggers: Real intake opens before the activation drill, tabletop scenarios, and signoff matrix are completed.
Authority decision is recorded without quorum, delegation, conditions, expiry, or stop triggers.
Private pilot records, access logs, incident evidence, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or support details appear in public files.
No-private-access roles, providers, public reviewers, or supporters can view private records.
Withdrawal, correction, support, incident pause, breach assessment, backup/restore, deletion, or public redaction QA fails.
Official Toastmasters forms, signatures, payments, member numbers, or charter records enter the public package or private pilot tool.
Activation continues past the first 72 hours without authority checkpoint, monitoring evidence, or closeout trigger.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics
OAIC Guide to undertaking privacy impact assessments
OAIC Data Breach Preparation and Response

privatePilotActivationDrill.safetyRule: This public v3.2 activation drill package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
privatePilotActivationDrill.activationRule: Do not open real private pilot intake until the activation drill, signoff matrix, tabletop scenarios, evidence packet, rehearsal tasks, first-72-hour monitoring checks, and recorded go/hold/no-go decision have passed.

noGoTriggers: NG-001: Any real name, email, phone, address, access need, incident detail, payment, member number, signature, authority record, or official Toastmasters record in public files
NG-002: No named First Nations authority or quorum for activation decision
NG-003: Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, or reporting not approved
NG-004: Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, PIA, retention, or incident response is incomplete
NG-005: No approved workspace, access register, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, or logs
NG-006: No-private-access roles, provider, supporter, or public reviewer can see private records
NG-007: Forms, member numbers, signatures, payments, or charter records enter public/pilot package
NG-008: No owner can pause intake, support participant, or run breach/cultural safety escalation
NG-009: Participant cannot withdraw or correct private record
NG-010: Provider gets real export before authority, contract, privacy, and access pass
NG-015: Second pilot, provider handoff, or broader rollout starts before closeout and authority record
NG-016: Go/hold/no-go record lacks conditions, expiry, owner, no-go triggers, or monitoring schedule
NG-017: No hour 0-72 checks or authority checkpoint after activation

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics

pilotControlTower.safetyRule: This public v3.3 Control Tower is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
pilotControlTower.controlRule: Do not make a real activation, provider handoff, or scale decision from any single page. Use the Control Tower to review stage status, blockers, dependencies, evidence classes, owners, and decision route first.
